headline: Share a customer stash with individual users, no team required
summary: A customer stash can now grant read access to its uploads to individual user accounts directly, without first creating a team. An administrator adds users to a stash by email, and each assigned user sees that customer's uploads on their dashboard under a new "Shared with me" section. The existing team assignment still works, and a stash can be shared with a team and individual users at the same time.

items.title: Assign individual users to a customer stash
items.body: The stash editor now has a "Users with access" control: an administrator adds user accounts by email and removes them at any time. Assigned users get read access to that stash's uploads. This is independent of teams — a stash no longer needs a team just to share its files with a specific person, and it can be shared with a team and individual users simultaneously. Member changes are audited, and a user's access is fully revoked the moment they are removed.

items.title: Dashboard "Shared with me" section
items.body: A user who has been added to one or more customer stashes sees a "Shared with me" section on their dashboard listing those stashes and the uploads in each, with open and ZIP-download actions. The list only ever shows stashes the user was explicitly added to.
